description: ModMe dev session lifecycle — single dispatcher (modme-session.ps1). VoltAgent-style: one bootstrap, explicit phases.

terminal.description: New integrated terminal — load env, ports, project profile

session-start.description: Workspace / worktree open — sync dotenv if root .env exists, write runtime env, doctor warn

pre-launch.description: VS Code task/debug pre-step — write .vscode/.env.runtime for envFile

session-end.description: Agent session end — delegates to vibe-session-finish when -Yes/-DryRun passed

verify.description: Test-automator smoke — env bootstrap + required paths (no secret values)

preflight.description: Optional quality gate — yarn preflight:fast or yarn preflight
